raw_consumer_statement:
I requested a statement credit for {$180.00} today. For a stolen payment to my credit card company, and the bogus {$29.00} fee their customer service automation added. 

The other bank ( XXXX ) says there is no record of the payment being returned. The AMEX record consists only of their self-substantiated claim, with no confirmation number from the other bank. {$160.00}, taken on XX/XX/XXXX. The claim it was returned was post-dated on XX/XX/XXXX. They also have to return the {$29.00} returned payment fee, because they lied. Unethical and unfair.
